title: Gospel of Philip: The Bridal Chamber
description: A Valentinian sacramental text on the mystery of spiritual marriage and the restoration of unity.
introduction: A Valentinian sacramental text on the mystery of spiritual marriage and the restoration of unity.

translation.original_text: ⲉϣⲱⲡⲉ ⲟⲩⲛ ⲟⲩⲟⲛ ⲛⲓⲙ ⲛⲧⲟϥ ⲟⲩⲥⲩⲛⲍⲩⲅⲟⲥ
translation.text: If anyone becomes a son of the bridal chamber, he will receive the light. If anyone does not receive it while in this place, he will not be able to receive it in the other place.
